summary: Joel announces that the Joel on Software website is migrating to new, more powerful server infrastructure. The site is moving from a single Dell PowerEdge server to a stack of six servers hosted at Peer1. The brief post serves as both an announcement and a confirmation that readers are already on the new infrastructure.
key_points: Joel on Software migrated from one Dell PowerEdge server to six servers at Peer1
The post itself serves as a live test — if readers can see it, the migration worked
Links to a more detailed article about the colocation expansion
money_quotes: Instead of one reasonable-sized Dell PowerEdge hosting the site, there's now a stack of six beefy servers down at Peer1.
key_insight: A brief infrastructure announcement noting the site's upgrade from a single server to a six-server cluster.
